body:
Define typed Pydantic models for all data structures currently using raw dicts. This enables runtime validation, IDE autocomplete, and API schema generation.

**Scope:**
- StudentProfile, EmployerProfile, CandidateShowcase models
- Tool definition model (replace `parameters: dict` in base.py)
- API request/response models for all endpoints
- DB row types for query results
- JSON column schemas (e.g., `history = Column(JSON)` in base.py)

**Current state:** 15+ instances of untyped dict/Any across agents. Only 8 files use typing imports out of ~60 Python files.
title: refactor: Pydantic models for all data structures (replace dict/Any)
